title: 3 Facts About Wolves

segments.text: A wolf's howl can be heard up to ten miles away.
And there is far more to them than the myths.
Wolves can run at nearly forty miles per hour when they hunt.
A wolf pack is usually just a family, led by the parents.
And every dog alive today descended from wolves.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Every dog alive descended from wolves, and a pack is really just a family. Follow for daily facts!
